# Vibez Citizens

> Vibez Citizens (VCSM) is a social commerce platform where creators and service providers build actor-based identities — personal profiles or business storefronts called Vports — to post content, book services, run catalogs, and connect with customers.

## What it is

Vibez Citizens combines a social feed with a service marketplace. Think Instagram meets Airbnb: people follow each other, post content, react, and chat — but service providers also run full storefronts with booking calendars, service catalogs, pricing, reviews, and portfolios, all under one identity.

## Core concepts

- **Citizens** — personal profile identities. Post content, follow others, subscribe to Vports, book services, leave reviews.
- **Vports** — business storefront identities. Run a service catalog, manage availability and bookings, showcase portfolio work, publish updates to the feed, and receive reviews.
- **Districts** — location-scoped communities (coming).
- **Vibes** — social feed posts from Citizens and Vports.
- **Sparks** — reactions (likes, roses, gifts) on posts and content.
- **Wanders** — async virtual postcards sent between actors.

## Vport business types

Vports cover 48 business categories across trades, beauty, food, health, professional services, retail, transport, and more. Some examples:

- Locksmiths — service areas, ETA coverage, emergency availability, portfolio of completed jobs
- Barbershops — team booking, availability calendar, cut portfolio, before/after work
- Restaurants — digital menu, booking, reviews with food-specific dimensions
- Gas stations — live fuel price board, customer price submissions
- Currency exchange offices — live FX rate pairs published to the feed
- Freelancers, trainers, tutors, designers, lawyers, and 40+ other types

## Key features

- **Booking** — appointment scheduling and emergency request modes per Vport
- **Service catalog** — structured service listings with pricing, ETA, requirements
- **Portfolio** — photo-based work showcase with kind-specific metadata (job type, before/after, etc.)
- **Reviews** — multi-dimension star ratings with category-weighted scoring
- **Feed** — unified social feed mixing personal posts and Vport business updates
- **Chat** — real-time messaging between Citizens and Vports
- **QR codes** — shareable business card links for each Vport
- **External site integration** — businesses can surface their Vport data on their own domain while VCSM remains the source of truth

## External integrations

Third-party business websites (example: tripointlockandkeys.com) can consume their Vport profile data — services, reviews, availability — via VCSM Edge Function APIs, keeping their own domain and design while VCSM manages the underlying business identity.

## Discovery

VCSM feeds a programmatic SEO directory at traffic.vibezcitizens.com (TRAZE) that generates city/service/provider pages for organic search, routing visitors back to platform profiles via deep links.

## Platform URL

https://vibezcitizens.com
